sensitive_family_notes: Not a sensitive family (model_family=dedicated-mt, not MiLMMT/Gemma-derived). M2M-100 (facebook/m2m100_418M) is released under the MIT License; the Xenova ONNX export (Xenova/m2m100_418M) carries the same MIT license. MIT permits commercial use, redistribution, and modification with no field-of-use or non-commercial restriction. Explicitly AVOIDED the NLLB and SeamlessM4T families (CC-BY-NC, non-commercial) which are blocked for this product. On-device inference performs no network upload of the source text, so the privacy impact is local-only translation. Weights are downloaded at runtime (first_run_download) under a permissive OSI license, not bundled in the APK.
license_summary: MIT License — commercial use OK, redistribution OK, modification OK. No copyleft, no field-of-use restriction, no non-commercial clause.
commercial_decision: MIT permits commercial distribution of the M2M-100 ONNX weights. Approved.
privacy_decision: On-device inference; source text is not transmitted off-device by the MT path. Approved.
app_store_decision: Runtime download of permissively-licensed (MIT) ONNX weights is consistent with app-store policies. Approved.
